top_events.event_id: sources: nvidia plans to unveil a new ai inference chip at its gtc conference in march; the system will have a groq-designed chip and openai is a customer (wall street journal)
top_events.title: Sources: Nvidia plans to unveil a new AI inference chip at its GTC conference in March; the system will have a Groq-designed chip and OpenAI is a customer (Wall Street Journal)
top_events.title_zh: 消息来源：Nvidia 计划在 3 月份的 GTC 大会上推出一款新的 AI 推理芯片；该系统将采用 Groq 设计的芯片，OpenAI 是其客户（华尔街日报）
top_events.title_bilingual: 消息来源：Nvidia 计划在 3 月份的 GTC 大会上推出一款新的 AI 推理芯片；该系统将采用 Groq 设计的芯片，OpenAI 是其客户（华尔街日报） / Sources: Nvidia plans to unveil a new AI inference chip at its GTC conference in March; the system will have a Groq-designed chip and OpenAI is a customer (Wall Street Journal)

top_events.event_id: anthropic says it'll challenge "any supply chain risk designation in court" and that the designation would only affect contractors' use of claude on dod work (anthropic)
top_events.title: Anthropic says it'll challenge "any supply chain risk designation in court" and that the designation would only affect contractors' use of Claude on DOD work (Anthropic)
top_events.title_zh: Anthropic 表示，它将在法庭上对“任何供应链风险指定”提出质疑，并且该指定只会影响承包商在国防部工作中使用克劳德 (Anthropic)
top_events.title_bilingual: Anthropic 表示，它将在法庭上对“任何供应链风险指定”提出质疑，并且该指定只会影响承包商在国防部工作中使用克劳德 (Anthropic) / Anthropic says it'll challenge "any supply chain risk designation in court" and that the designation would only affect contractors' use of Claude on DOD work (Anthropic)
